title: cyclosorus microbasis
intro: Cyclosorus microbasis, also known as Microsorum diversifolium, is a type of fern native to tropical Asia, specifically in countries such as Thailand, Malaysia, and Indonesia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Cyclosorus microbasis include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant are usually dried and crushed into powder or made into tea, and it can also be used as a poultice to treat skin conditions.
